body:
A Claude review of parentage in the oxidoreductase branch revealed the following issues (I verified them all manually, and made a few more suggestions below - e.g. updated defs to match RHEA):

- [x] GO:0102394 '4-hydroxy-L-isoleucine dehydrogenase' EC:1.14.11.45 — the EC is actually L-isoleucine 4-hydroxylase, a 2-OG-dependent dioxygenase. The GO term name is wrong ("dehydrogenase" is a misnomer); consequently it's misparented under GO:0016616 (CH-OH NAD/NADP). Term should be renamed and reparented to GO:0016706.

- [x] GO:0050607 'mycothiol-dependent formaldehyde dehydrogenase' EC:1.1.1.306 is under GO:0016620 (EC:1.2.1.-). EC 1.1.1.306 is S-(hydroxymethyl)mycothiol dehydrogenase — it acts on a CH-OH donor, so correct parent is GO:0016616 (EC:1.1.1.-). Also, update name to "S-(hydroxymethyl)mycothiol dehydrogenase activity" to match EC, and update def to 
"Catalysis of the reaction: S-(hydroxymethyl)mycothiol + NAD+ = S-formylmycothiol + NADH + H+." using RHEA:28502 as the def xref.

- [x] GO:0008762 UDP-N-acetylmuramate dehydrogenase EC:1.3.1.98 is under GO:0016616 (1.1.1.-). Should be under GO:0016628 (CH-CH with NAD/NADP; EC 1.3.1.-). Also update def to "Catalysis of the reaction: UDP-N-acetyl-alpha-D-muramate + NADP+ = UDP-N-acetyl-3-O-(1-carboxyvinyl)-alpha-D-glucosamine + NADPH + H+." and use RHEA:12248 as the def xref.

- [x] GO:0008863 formate DH (NAD+) EC:1.17.1.9 and GO:0047899 formate DH (NADP+) EC:1.17.1.10 are under GO:0016620 (EC:1.2.1.-). Formate DH EC class 1.17 (CH or CH2 group) ≠ 1.2 (aldehyde/oxo group). Reparent both terms under GO:0016726 oxidoreductase activity, acting on CH or CH2 groups, NAD or NADP as acceptor (EC:1.17.1.-).

- [x] GO:0047111 formate DH (cytochrome) EC:1.17.2.3 — similar wrong-class parent. Re-parent under GO:0016725 oxidoreductase activity, acting on CH or CH2 groups (EC:1.17.-.-) because there is no GO term equivalent to EC:1.17.2.-.

- [x] GO:0008839 4-hydroxy-THDP reductase EC:1.17.1.8 is under GO:0016628 (EC:1.3.1.-). Class 1.17 ≠ 1.3. Reparent under GO:0016726 oxidoreductase activity, acting on CH or CH2 groups, NAD or NADP as acceptor (EC:1.17.1.-).

- [x] GO:0018525 4-hydroxybenzoyl-CoA reductase EC:1.1.7.1 under GO:0016636 (EC:1.3.7.-). Classes differ. Reparent under GO:0016614 oxidoreductase activity, acting on CH-OH group of donors (EC:1.1.-.-) because there is no GO term equivalent to EC:1.3.7.-. Also, replace defitinon with current RHEA one, "Catalysis of the reaction: oxidized 2[4Fe-4S]-[ferredoxin] + benzoyl-CoA + H2O = 4-hydroxybenzoyl-CoA + reduced 2[4Fe-4S]-[ferredoxin] + 2 H+.".

- [x] GO:0044684 dihydromethanopterin reductase EC:1.5.99.15 under GO:0016646 (EC:1.5.1.-). 1.5.99 ≠ 1.5.1. Reparent under GO:0016645 oxidoreductase activity, acting on the CH-NH group of donors (EC:1.5.-.- ). Also, change def to "Catalysis of the reaction: 5,6,7,8-tetrahydromethanopterin + acceptor = 7,8-dihydromethanopterin + reduced acceptor." to match RHEA:42804, and replace 'GOC:mengo_curators' with RHEA:42804 in def xref (keep the PMID xref).

- [x] GO:0033717 gluconate 2-dehydrogenase (acceptor) EC:1.1.99.3 under GO:0016616 (EC:1.1.1.-). Acceptor-class (.99) ≠ NAD/NADP (.1). Reparent to GO:0016614 oxidoreductase activity, acting on CH-OH group of donors (EC:1.1.-.- ).

- [x] GO:0047081 3-hydroxy-2-methylpyridinecarboxylate dioxygenase [NAD(P)H] activity (EC:1.14.13.242) under GO:0016708 (EC:1.14.12.-). Sub-subclass mismatch. Reparent to GO:0016709 oxidoreductase activity, acting on paired donors, with incorporation or reduction of molecular oxygen, NAD(P)H as one donor, and incorporation of one atom of oxygen (EC:1.14.13.-). Also, rename this term to "3-hydroxy-2-methylpyridine-5-carboxylate monooxygenase [NAD(P)H] activity" and change def to "Catalysis of the reaction: 3-hydroxy-2-methylpyridine-5-carboxylate + NAD(P)H + O2 = 2-(acetamidomethylene)succinate + NAD(P)+.".

- [x] GO:0106145 scopoletin 8-hydroxylase EC:1.14.11.60 under GO:0016709 (EC:1.14.13.-). Reparent to be under GO:0016706 (EC:1.14.11.-). Also change def to "Catalysis of the reaction: scopoletin + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = fraxetin + succinate + CO2.".

- [x] GO:0016703 (EC:1.13.12.-, internal monooxygenase) is parent of: GO:0010277 chlorophyllide a oxygenase (EC:1.14.13.122), GO:0050588 apo-β-carotenoid dioxygenase (EC:1.13.11.67) — the latter is a dioxygenase under a monooxygenase grouping. Reparent GO:0010277 to GO:0016709 (EC:1.14.13.-) and reparent GO:0050588 to GO:0016702 (EC:1.13.11.-).

- [x] GO:0016706 (EC:1.14.11.-, 2-OG dioxygenase) is parent of: GO:0033759 flavone synthase, GO:0045431 flavonol synthase, GO:0047594 6β-hydroxyhyoscyamine epoxidase, GO:0050589 leucocyanidin oxygenase (all EC:1.14.20.x) — reparent all four under GO:0050498 (EC:1.14.20.-).

- [x] GO:0050498 (EC:1.14.20.-) ironically hosts GO:0102717 DIBOA-glucoside oxygenase EC:1.14.11.59 going the other direction. Reparent to GO:0016706 (EC:1.14.11.-). Also, change def to "Catalysis of the reaction: DIBOA beta-D-glucoside + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = TRIBOA beta-D-glucoside + succinate + CO2." and use RHEA:32115 as the sole def xef.

- [x] GO:0016709 hosts GO:0050616 secologanin synthase EC:1.14.19.62 - reparent under GO:0016717 (EC:1.14.19.-). Also, change def to "Catalysis of the reaction: loganin + reduced [NADPH—hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = secologanin + oxidized [NADPH—hemoprotein reductase] + 2 H2O + H+." and use RHEA:20585 as the sole def xref.

- [x] GO:0016709 also hosts GO:0102915 piperitol synthase EC:1.14.19.74 — reparent under GO:0016717 (EC:1.14.19.-). Also, change def to "Catalysis of the reaction: (+)-pinoresinol + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = (+)-piperitol + oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + 2 H2O + H+. Also catalyzes the synthesis of (+)-sesamin from (+)-piperitol."

- [x] GO:0016730 (EC:1.18.-.-, acting on iron-sulfur proteins) hosts GO:0032441 pheophorbide a oxygenase EC:1.14.15.17 — reparent under GO:0016713 (EC:1.14.15.-). Also, change def to "Catalysis of the reaction: pheophorbide a + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + O2 + 2 H(+) = red chlorophyll catabolite + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin]." and add RHEA:48140 as a def xref.

- [x] GO:0016709 (EC:1.14.13.-) hosts two EC:1.14.15.x (GO:0004498, GO:0036199) — reparent to GO:0016713 (EC:1.14.15.-).

- [x] GO:0016702 (EC:1.13.11.-) hosts GO:0018570 p-cumate 2,3-dioxygenase EC:1.14.12.25 — wrong EC sub-subclass. Reparent to GO:0016708 (EC:1.14.12.-)
title: Parentage issues within 'oxidoreductase activity' branch
